title: Sounds & Music
description: Editing the Auditory part just a bit
body:
### **📋 About**

Sounds & Music edits and “fixes” specific sounds as well as adding more Music by C418, Gareth Coker, Shauny Jang, Deadmau5 and some community made ones if fitting enough.

All rights go to each creator. We did not make any of the music included in this pack and therefore take no credit for them.

***

### **🎵 Changes**
<details>
<summary>📓 Log Output</summary>

| Type  | String | File Names |
| ------------- | ------------- |  ------------- |
| Output Fix  | item.goat_horn.play  | -  |
| Output Fix  | entity.goat.screaming.horn_break  | horn_break1-horn_break4  |
| Output Fix / Music Overhaul  | music.overworld.cherry_grove  | minecraft, clark, sweden, comforting_memories, infinite amethyst, key, oxygene, mice_on_venus, wending, kyoto, memento mori, door, equinoxe  |
</details>
<details>
<summary>🔊 Sounds</summary>

| Type | String | Description | Affects |
| ----- | ------ |  ----------- | --------- |
| 🔄️Sound Change | ui.button.click | Now sounds like the button click from the legacy console editions | Menu Buttons |
| ↔️Sound Swap | entity.generic.drink | Uses some drinking sounds of the Wandering Trader | Drinkable Potions, Milk |
| ↔️Sound Swap | entity.splash_potion.throw entity.lingering_potion.throw | Uses some throwing sounds of the Witch | Splash Potions, Lingering Potions |
| ↔️Sound Swap | entity.ender_pearl.throw  | Uses Ender Eye throwing sound for consistency | Ender Pearl |
| 🔧Sound Adjustment | item.chorus_fruit.teleport  | Lower pitched to differentiate teleport sounds | Chorus Fruit |
| 🔧Sound Adjustment | block.bamboo_wood_pressure_plate.click_off/on block.cherry_wood_pressure_plate.click_off/on block.nether_wood_pressure_plate.click_off/on block.wooden_pressure_plate.click_off/on block.metal_pressure_plate.click_off/on | Pitched to make them sound like their button/block counterpart | Wooden Pressure Plates |
| 🔄️Sound Change | block.stone_button.click_off/on | Changed to give these own sounds | Stone and Blackstone Pressure Plate & Button |
| 🔧Sound Adjustment | block.anvil.break | Changed to sound like Iron Block breaking instead of Stone | Anvil |
| ➕Sound Addition | ui.toast.challenge_complete | Added alternative challenge completion sounds courtesy of Samuel Åberg/sm00 | Challenge Completion |
| ➕Sound Addition | entity.player.levelup | Added the old level up sound with a very rare chance | Leveling Up |
| 🔄️Sound Change | block.piston.contract & block.piston.extend | Remixed the temporary new piston sound Mojang tried out with the current one | Pistons |
| ↔️Sound Swap | entity.wind_charge.throw | Changed to the Breeze shooting sound | Wind Charge |
| ➕Sound Addition | block.enchantment_table.use | Added enchanting variations from Minecraft: Dungeons | Enchanting Table |
| 🔧Sound Adjustment | block.portal.ambient | Lowered the attenuation distance to 8 | Nether Portal |
| 🔧Sound Adjustment | music_disc.* | Lowered the attenuation distance to 2 | Jukebox/Playing Music Discs |

</details>
<details>
<summary>💿 Music Discs</summary>

| Track | Plays as | Weight | Artist |
| ------ | -------- | ------- | ------ |
| Eleven | 11 | 11 | C418 |
| Death | 5 | 5 | C418 |
| K | 5 | 11 | bouncytorch |
| Dog | cat | 26 | C418 |
| Supernova | strad | 10 | bouncytorch |
</details>
